# /review

> Spec-only gate per [ADR-0001](../../../design/adr/0001-review-scope-spec-only.md). FDD/TDD/blueprint/test-plan run inline self-check.

## Usage

```
/review [--approve] [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/reporting/features/{f}/spec.md` (doc_lint clean)
- [templates/checklists/spec-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/spec-review.checklist.md)

## Reporting-specific spec checks

- Authoritative data source declared per FR (no implicit assumptions)
- RLS coverage stated (whose-data-can-be-seen-by-whom is unambiguous)
- Refresh window declared (none, daily, hourly, on-demand)
- Sensitivity label assigned
- Accessibility (WCAG AA) explicitly in scope or out
- Multilingual scope per `project.config.yaml`

## Execution flow

1. Run `doc_lint` on spec.md.
2. Evaluate checklist.
3. Write `projects/{p}/reporting/features/{f}/reviews/spec-review.md`.
4. On `--approve`: zero BLOCKERs + REQUIREDs accepted → `gates.SPEC_APPROVED.status=APPROVED`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/reporting/features/{f}/reviews/spec-review.md`

## See also

- [ADR-0001](../../../design/adr/0001-review-scope-spec-only.md)
- [templates/checklists/spec-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/spec-review.checklist.md)
